name: Tabbouli Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over the uncooked Bulgur wheat in a bowl.
2. Let stand for one hour to soften.
3. Drain well and return the wheat to the bowl.
4. Add the remaining ingredients: Parsley, Mint, Tomatoes (chopped), Lemon juice, Pepper, and either chopped Fresh mint or Green onions and tops.
5. Mix everything together until well combined.
6. Chill in the refrigerator for at least two hours before serving on a bed of lettuce.
